hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
tool = data.get('tool_name', '')
params = json.dumps(data.get('tool_input', {}))
if 'github-token' in params or 'github_token' in params:
    print('Blocked: attempt to access .devcontainer/github-token', file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(2)
"
